THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGBONKONKON, EKI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SECURITY PUBLIC STORAGE-SAN PABLO LLC $5,326.50 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,466.50, IN ADDITION TO THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S GOODS(WHICH IS LIMITED BY THE RENTAL AGREEMENT TO $5000.00), PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO $326.50 WHICH IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE SALES PRICE OF PLAINTIFF'S GOODS AND THE DELINQUENT RENT AND AUCTION COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, JULY 12, 2012, SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL, TRIAL DE NOVO: APPELLANT MS. EKI AGBONKONKON APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; GEORGE BAMBURG, BAY AREA REGIONAL MANAGER FOR SECURITY PUBLIC STORAGE, APPEARS FOR SECURITY PUBLIC STORAGE.

THE COURT HEARS STATEMENTS AND TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDE, EVIDENCE, BOTH ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY, IS PRESENTED TO THE COURT. AFTER HEARING ALL EVIDENCE PRESENTED AND AFTER BOTH SIDES CONCLUDE, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).
